## 📌 Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the changes in this PR.
Explain the problem, the solution, and any relevant context.

---

## 🔗 SPA Number
Include the SPA number related to this work (required):
Example: SPA-1234

---

## 🧪 What Was Changed
- Summarize key changes
- Mention impacted components, modules, or services

---

## 🖼️ Screenshots (if applicable)
Add before/after screenshots or logs to help reviewers understand the change.

---

## ✅ Author Checklist
Please check at least one item below (required):

- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data committed
- [ ] Verified locally and all tests pass

---

## 🔍 Reviewer Checklist
Reviewers should validate the following:

- [ ] Logic is correct and handles edge cases
- [ ] Tests are meaningful and sufficient
- [ ] No security or performance concerns
- [ ] Documentation is clear and updated
- [ ] All comments resolved before approval
